mapper.select: SELECT combo.* , COALESCE((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_CD = combo.LANG_CD AND LANG_TYPE = 'ko'), combo.TEXT) AS LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_COMBO combo WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT COMBO_CD as comboCd , VALUE AS comboVal , COALESCE((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_CD = combo.LANG_CD AND LANG_TYPE = 'ko'), TEXT) AS comboLabel , TOOLTIP as comboTooltip FROM DOCS_COMBO combo WHERE COMBO_CD = #{comboCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT COMBO_CD as comboCd , COALESCE((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_TYPE = 'ko' AND LANG_CD = A1.LANG_CD), A1.TEXT) AS comboLabel , VALUE AS comboVal , COALESCE((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_TYPE = 'ko' AND LANG_CD = A1.TOOLTIP), A1.TOOLTIP) AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_COMBO A1 WHERE COMBO_CD = #{comboCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SEQ ASC

SELECT u.USER_NM AS comboVal , u.USER_NM AS comboLabel , p.POSITION_NM AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER u LEFT JOIN DOCS_POSITION p ON u.POSITION_CD = p.POSITION_CD WHERE u.USE_YN = 'Y' AND u.DEL_YN = 'N' AND u.DEPT_CD = 'D1DJ151' ORDER BY u.USER_NM

SELECT COMBO_CD AS comboCd, VALUE AS comboVal, COALESCE((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_CD = combo.LANG_CD AND LANG_TYPE = 'ko'), TEXT) AS comboLabel, TOOLTIP as comboTooltip FROM DOCS_COMBO combo WHERE COMBO_CD = 'docClassCd2' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND VALUE = 'A0401' ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT COMBO_CD AS comboCd, VALUE AS comboVal, COALESCE((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_CD = combo.LANG_CD AND LANG_TYPE = 'ko'), TEXT) AS comboLabel, TOOLTIP as comboTooltip FROM DOCS_COMBO combo WHERE COMBO_CD = 'docClassCd2' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND VALUE != 'A0401' ORDER BY SEQ
